methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Perennial Autonomy is a government-contract-stage defense and security company backed by Schmidt and staffed with talent from SpaceX, Google, and Apple. The company has raised Schmidt funding plus a $500M IDIQ contract vehicle. The valuation universe spans 19 same-sector peers, including two public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private firms, with top private benchmarks including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems.

Peer-median valuation is not applicable here. The Defense & Security sector contains only 19 total peers, and the narrow filters—same-stage positioning, adjacent-stage proximity, and comparable valuation tier—yielded fewer than the three datapoints required for a robust triangulation. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the specialized nature of government contracting and the capital intensity of defense technology. The public comps (DRSHF and IDEAFORGE.NS) and identified private set provide market context but do not constitute a sufficient narrow peer base for quantitative triangulation.

Without adequate same-stage or adjacent-stage peer data, traditional valuation methods cannot be responsibly applied. The analysis supports deferring to contract value (the $500M IDIQ) and portfolio composition as indicative anchors rather than deriving a point estimate or range. Key uncertainties include government contract drawdown timing, the weight of the Schmidt backing relative to operational revenue, and comparable precedent for defense autonomy exits at this stage. Further data collection or strategic comps from adjacent defense verticals would be necessary to support a triangulated valuation range.
